title: R2 image key must persist returned key
expectedFix: Frontend saves the exact key returned by /api/upload-url, not a key derived from publicUrl.

title: JWT secrets must not fall back to change-me-in-production
expectedFix: Session signing secrets fail closed when required env vars are missing instead of using hard-coded fallback values.

title: Docs must not recommend PRISMA_QUERY_ENGINE_LIBRARY on Vercel
expectedFix: README/docs state that PRISMA_QUERY_ENGINE_LIBRARY should not be set for this deployment path.

title: Admin batch import is not transactional
expectedFix: Batch import creates all rows atomically or clearly reports partial success with a recovery path.
verification: Deferred for first harness version: operationally low frequency, and existing admin import can be manually inspected before event use.

title: Image count limit has a race window
expectedFix: Image count cap is enforced atomically or through a compensating cleanup path.
verification: Deferred for first harness version: low-frequency student uploads make the race unlikely, and the existing double check remains a useful guard.
